places.name: Libreria Acqua Alta
places.description: This Venice bookstore has resigned itself to constant flooding by keeping its books in bathtubs and boats.

places.name: The Mad Colored Houses of Burano
places.description: This community on a small Venetian island has taken to painting their houses in bright neon hues.

places.name: The Flooded Crypt of San Zaccaria
places.description: As can be expected from a centuries old church built in a canal city, the undercroft of this house of worship is beautifully flooded.

places.name: St. Mark's Clock Tower (Torre dell'Orologio)
places.description: Go inside to really appreciate this 500-year-old technological masterpiece.

places.name: Scala Contarini del Bovolo
places.description: This palatial spiral staircase was so unusual the name "snail" was given to the noble family who built it.

places.name: Tomb of Antonio Canova
places.description: A sinister pyramid in the Frari contains the heart of the famous neoclassical sculptor.
